description: Medusa speculative-decoding adapter for MERaLiON-2-3B ASR. K=4 residual-MLP heads sharing the base model's lm_head. ~1.51x latency speedup on greedy ASR decode with WER preserved.
training_data: 10000 IMDA_PART1 audio samples, (hidden_state, next_token) pairs captured during real inference
